heading: Membership
label: 153503 Membership
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15350336:4608., , .Aug. 19, 1964Pub. L. 88–449, § 878 Stat. 498
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15350336:4608., , .Aug. 19, 1964Pub. L. 88–449, § 878 Stat. 498

children.heading: .—Eligibility
children.label: a .—Eligibility
children.text: Except as provided in this chapter, eligibility for membership in the corporation and the rights and privileges of members are as provided in the constitution and bylaws of the corporation.

children.heading: .—Voting
children.label: b .—Voting
children.text: Each member (except an honorary or associate member) has one vote on each matter submitted to a vote at a meeting of the members.
